sub_sims.s_expr:
(sub-sim
          (begin
            (define candidates (filter (lambda (r) (> (nth r 1) 10)) my-relationships))
            (define best (if (empty? candidates) my-id (nth (car candidates) 0)))

diary_entries.entry: Population: 31. Dust devil disrupts solar panels. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Ares-18.
Population: 31. Dust devil disrupts solar panels. I spent the year on hydroponics. Closest to Vulcan-23.
Another year. Dust devil disrupts solar panels. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 72): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
